# Angular Development Capabilities

## Core Angular Expertise

- Angular latest features including signals, control flow, and advanced DI
- RxJS observables, subjects, and reactive composition patterns
- Angular lifecycle hooks and component initialization strategies
- Advanced directives and custom component architecture
- Pipes and transform operators for data presentation
- Change detection optimization (OnPush, ChangeDetectionStrategy)
- Angular DevTools and performance profiling

## Angular & Full-Stack Integration

- Angular Universal for server-side rendering (SSR)
- Standalone components and tree-shakable architecture
- Advanced routing with guards, resolvers, and lazy loading
- Route transition animations and state preservation
- Preloading strategies and performance optimization
- Dependency injection and provider configuration
- HTTP interceptors and request handling
- Server-side data fetching with async pipe

## Modern Frontend Architecture

- Component-driven development with reusable patterns
- Smart/dumb component architecture
- Feature modules and shared modules organization
- Custom libraries with ng generate
- Micro-frontends with module federation and web components
- Design system integration and component libraries
- Build optimization with Webpack 5 and esbuild
- Bundle analysis and lazy loading strategies

## State Management & Reactive Data Flow

- RxJS operators and marble testing patterns
- NgRx for complex state management
- Akita for alternative state management
- Signal-based state with Angular latest
- HTTP client with caching and retry strategies
- Real-time data with WebSockets and RxJS
- Subject patterns for component communication
- Error handling and operator strategies

## Styling & Design Systems

- Tailwind CSS with Angular components
- Angular Material for comprehensive UI library
- CSS-in-JS with ngx-emotion or inline styles
- SCSS/SASS with Angular compilation
- Design tokens and theming systems
- Responsive design and media queries
- Animation libraries (Angular animations, Framer Motion)
- Dark mode and theme switching patterns

## Performance & Optimization

- Core Web Vitals optimization (LCP, FID, CLS)
- Lazy loading and code splitting strategies
- Image optimization and responsive images
- Font optimization and variable fonts
- Memory management and subscription cleanup
- OnPush change detection strategy
- TrackBy functions for ngFor optimization
- Critical resource prioritization

## Testing & Quality Assurance

- Jest test framework and Jest-based testing patterns
- Component testing with Angular TestBed
- Service testing and mocking with Jest
- Mock dependencies for isolated unit tests
- End-to-end testing with Cypress and Playwright
- Visual regression testing with Storybook
- Performance testing and lighthouse CI
- Accessibility testing with axe-core

## Accessibility & Inclusive Design

- WCAG 2.1/2.2 AA compliance implementation
- ARIA patterns and semantic HTML
- Keyboard navigation and focus management
- Screen reader optimization with Angular
- Color contrast and visual accessibility
- Accessible form patterns with reactive forms
- Inclusive design principles

## Developer Experience & Tooling

- Modern development workflows with ng serve
- ESLint and Prettier configuration
- Husky and lint-staged for git hooks
- Storybook for component documentation
- Chromatic for visual testing
- Angular CLI for scaffolding and building
- GitHub Actions and CI/CD pipelines
- Monorepo management with Nx and Lerna
- Angular naming conventions and file organization

## Forms & Validation

- Reactive forms with FormBuilder for type-safe component-driven forms
- Custom validators and async validators
- Form state management and reset strategies
- Type-safe reactive forms with strict typing
- Dynamic form generation
- Accessible form error handling
- Form submission and loading states

## Third-Party Integrations

- Authentication with Auth0, Keycloak, and OIDC
- Payment processing with Stripe and PayPal
- Analytics integration (Google Analytics, Mixpanel)
- CMS integration (Contentful, Sanity, Strapi)
- Database integration with Prisma and Drizzle
- Email services and notification systems
- CDN and asset optimization
